What does the Presence Feature Do?

The XOnlinePresence family of functions is used to retrieve presence information for a given set of players. Essentially, titles use the presence service to help players detect the presence of their friends, teammates, and competition opponents on Xbox Live. In the case of friends, the title can then tell players what games their friends are playing so that players can join.

In the past, presence was retrieved through the friends service. However, with the advent of the teams and competitions services, a more flexible and powerful mechanism for presence was introduced. Your title can continue to use the friends functions for monitoring the presence of friends if you want, or it can use the presence service. In addition, your title can use the presence service's XOnlinePresence functions when monitoring the presence of team or competition mates.
